# coJournalist

> AI-powered local news monitoring for journalists and newsrooms. You define scouts that watch URLs, local news, social profiles, and council agendas; coJournalist runs them on a schedule, extracts atomic facts, de-duplicates across sources, and hands the results to you — or to your AI assistant — as a searchable knowledge base.

coJournalist runs five scout types, each with its own pipeline and credit cost: Page Scout (web, 1 credit), Location Scout and Beat Scout (pulse, 7 credits), Social Scout (2–15 credits), Civic Scout (20 credits). Credits are decremented per run.

Pricing (USD, monthly): Free $0 / 100 credits, Pro $10 / 1,000 credits, Team $50 / 5,000 shared credits with unlimited seats. Self-hosting is allowed under the Sustainable Use License — same feature set, you supply your own Supabase, Firecrawl, Gemini, Apify, and Resend keys. Sign in and billing go through MuckRock OAuth.

Three integration surfaces: an MCP server at `/mcp` with OAuth 2.1, a REST API at `/functions/v1` with Bearer JWT auth, and a Deno-based CLI called `cojo`. All three expose the same underlying objects: projects, scouts, runs, information units, entities, reflections, and exports. AI assistants are expected to draft freely but cite only verified units — verification is an explicit editorial step that stamps the user's ID into the audit trail.

## Getting started

- [App / sign in](https://www.cojournalist.ai): Home page and login (MuckRock OAuth)
- [Quickstart](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#quickstart): Five-minute walkthrough — sign in, create a scout, connect an AI assistant, verify findings
- [Docs home](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs): Full documentation — introduction, quickstart, scouts, concepts, integrations, cookbook, reference
- [Full docs (flattened)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/llms-full.txt): All documentation in one plain-text file, optimized for LLM ingestion
- [FAQ](https://www.cojournalist.ai/faq): Licensing, self-hosting, editorial workflow

## Pricing

Plans (USD/month): Free $0 = 100 credits · Pro $10 = 1,000 credits · Team $50 = 5,000 shared credits.

Credits per scout run: Page Scout 1 · Location/Beat Scout 7 · Social Scout 2 (Instagram/X/TikTok/LinkedIn) or 15 (Facebook) · Civic Scout 20.

- [Pricing page](https://www.cojournalist.ai/pricing): Full plan comparison and checkout

## API

- [Interactive API reference](https://www.cojournalist.ai/swagger): Swagger UI over the OpenAPI 3.1 spec
- [OpenAPI spec (JSON)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/functions/v1/openapi-spec): Machine-readable schema for every REST endpoint
- [REST base URL](https://www.cojournalist.ai/functions/v1): Root of all REST endpoints; Bearer JWT auth
- [MCP server](https://www.cojournalist.ai/mcp): JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP endpoint with embedded OAuth 2.1 authorization server (RFC 8414 metadata, RFC 7591 dynamic registration)

## Scouts

- [Page Scout (docs)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#scout-page): Watches one URL for content changes using Firecrawl changeTracking with per-scout baselines
- [Location Scout (docs)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#scout-location): Local news for a geography, favouring niche sources, 12-language query generation
- [Beat Scout (docs)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#scout-beat): Topic news across reliable outlets, criteria-driven, no location required
- [Social Scout (docs)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#scout-social): Monitors Instagram, X, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok for new or removed posts
- [Civic Scout (docs)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#scout-civic): Council agendas and minutes (PDFs included), promise extraction with meeting-date context

## Concepts

- [Information units](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#units): Atomic facts extracted from sources; vector-embedded and de-duplicated
- [Entities](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#entities): People, organisations, locations, documents resolved across units
- [Deduplication](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#dedup): Four layers — fact, source, entity, time
- [Verification](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#verification): Editorial checkpoint; stamps user ID into `verified_by`
- [Credits](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#credits): Cost model and monthly budget math

## Integrations

- [MCP server setup](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#mcp): Connect Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Goose, or any MCP client
- [REST API](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#rest): `curl` examples, pagination, error format
- [CLI (`cojo`)](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#cli): Deno-based binary; install, configure, common commands

## Cookbook

- [Daily triage](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#recipe-triage): Worked example — an AI assistant prepares a morning brief
- [Structured extraction](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#recipe-extract): Pull agenda items as a markdown table
- [Export to CMS](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#recipe-export): Pipe `cojo export` into a CMS draft endpoint

## Self-hosting and source

- [Self-hosting guide](https://www.cojournalist.ai/docs#selfhost): Sustainable Use License; your own Supabase, Firecrawl, Gemini, Apify, Resend keys
- [Sustainable Use License FAQ](https://www.cojournalist.ai/faq): What's allowed (newsroom use, modification) and what isn't (reselling, hosting as a service)
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/buriedsignals/cojournalist-os): Source; issues; releases
- [Changelog](https://github.com/buriedsignals/cojournalist-os/releases): Release notes

## Support

- [Open an issue](https://github.com/buriedsignals/cojournalist-os/issues): Bugs and feature requests (routed via Linear)
- GitHub Discussions: https://github.com/buriedsignals/cojournalist-os/discussions
